messages.content: Give me a tree days travel plan in Oslo

Sure, here's a sample one-day travel plan for Oslo:

Day 1: Arrive at Oslo Airport and check into your hotel.

Day 2-3: Explore the city and visit the museums and the zoo.

Day 4-5: Visit the Royal Palace, the National Gallery, and the Museum of Modern Art.

Day 6-7: Visit the Old Botanical Garden and the Botanical Museum.

Day 8-10: Visit the GammelOpera, the Ubbergesetzt Oper, and the "Entsaget" sculpture park.

Day 11-13: Visit the National Maritime Museum and the Museum of the Atlantic.

Day 14: Visit the Nobel Peace Center and the Nobel Museum.

Day 15-16: Visit the Scandinavian Design Centre and the Design Museum.

Day 17-20: Visit the Norwegian National Museum of Natural History and the Natural History Museum.

Day 21-22: Visit the National Museum of Fine Arts and the National Gallery of Norway.

Day 23-24: Visit the Norsk Folk Museum and the Museum of Nordic Design.

Day 25-26: Visit the National Gallery of Norway and the Science Museum.

Day 27: Visit the National Gallery of Norway and the Norwegian Maritime Museum.

Day 28-30: Visit the Norwegian National Museum of History and the Norwegian National Gallery.

Day 31-32: Visit the Norwegian National Museum of Nature and Science.

Day 33-35: Visit the Norwegian National Gallery of Art and the National Gallery of Norway.

Day 36: Visit the Norwegian National Gallery of Art and the National Gallery of Norway.

Day 37-39: Visit the Norwegian National Gallery of Art and the National Gallery of Norway.
